SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils

パッケージ org.commonutils.internal

package org.commonutils.internal
Implementation-only helpers for org.commonutils. Packages in this hierarchy are not exported from the org.commonutils module; they compile only as part of this library artifact. Application code depending on commonutils must not compile against types in org.commonutils.internal.
  • クラス
    クラス
    説明
    Contracts
    Internal helpers enforcing NonNegative and Positive contracts at runtime.
